nama_parfum: Limited-Edition Miss Dior Mini Miss Case
description: Solid Perfume Couture Case description application tips description Mini Miss, Maximum Couture. The Mini Miss solid perfumes from the Miss Dior line boast a wardrobe of cases in limited edition. Dress your solid perfume in a case inspired by Dior couture, adorned with the graphic logo of the "Miss Dior" ready-to-wear line launched in 1967. Available in three colors � pale blue, pale pink and pop pink � this logomania motif flaunts a bold and elegant style in perfect keeping with the Miss Dior identity. The Miss Dior Mini Miss case is sold individually. To be used with the Miss Dior Blooming Bouquet, Miss Dior Eau de Parfum and Miss Dior Parfum solid perfume refills. application tips 1. Add the case of your choice to your basket. 2. Then add the Miss Dior Mini Miss refill of your choice to your basket. 3. The Miss Dior Mini Miss case and solid perfume are sold separately. Be sure you have added both items to your basket before validating your order. description application tips description Mini Miss, Maximum Couture. nama_parfum: Miss Dior Parfum Mini Miss Solid Perfume
description: Alcohol-Free Fragrance Stick - Intense Floral, Fruity and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Miss Dior Parfum is reinvented in an alcohol-free solid perfume with a sheer finish, to apply the intense floral, fruity and woody notes of the fragrance directly to the skin. A mini-object with maxi-effects, Miss Dior Parfum solid perfume is highly concentrated to prolong the scent of Miss Dior Parfum. Infused with rose wax, the stick melts comfortably onto the skin, without any sticky residue, leaving it fragrant and hydrated. The solid perfume is applied on pulse points (neck, d�collet�, wrists) on its own or as complementary touch-ups to the spray. Miss Dior Parfum Mini Miss is housed in a jacquard case woven with the houndstooth pattern, a signature of the Dior wardrobe style. A reflection of the elegant and joyful Miss Dior spirit, it is the perfect on-the-go couture accessory. ingredients #20962 OCTYLDODECANOL � COCO-CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � DIBUTYL LAUROYL GLUTAMIDE � PHYTOSTERYL/OCTYLDODECYL LAUROYL GLUTAMATE � DIBUTYL ETHYLHEXANOYL GLUTAMIDE � LINALOOL � LIMONENE � BENZYL SALICYLATE � CITRONELLOL � DIPROPYLENE GLYCOL � GERANIOL � ROSA CENTIFOLIA FLOWER WAX � ROSA DAMASCENA FLOWER WAX � COUMARIN � HEXYL CINNAMAL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � TOCOPHEROL � POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE � CITRAL � TRIMETHYLOLPROPANE TRIISOSTEARATE � BENZYL BENZOATE � CI 15985 (YELLOW 6 LAKE) � BENZYL ALCOHOL � CI 77499 (IRON OXIDES) � ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE � CI 15850 (RED 7 LAKE) � CI 15850 (RED 6) � PROPYL GALLATE application tips Apply the fragrance stick on pulse points - wrists, neck and d�collet� - alone or as a complement to spray fragrances. The texture leaves no color on the skin, only the floral, fruity and woody scent of Miss Dior Parfum. Do not apply on lips. olfactory notes Base Notes AMBERY WOODS A sensually and solidly constructed woody-ambery composition, anchored by a full and refined patchouli, darkened by a dense and binding Alaskan cedar. A forest floor carpeted with moss seems to envelop the composition. Heart Notes STAR JASMINE Floral accords dominated by the intensity of a jasmine note, tailor-made for Dior. They are infused with vibrant, sweet and juicy notes, reminiscent of plump, succulent wild strawberries. Francis Kurkdjian wanted to reproduce the specific notes extracted from the jasmine of 1947, the year Miss Dior was born. A jasmine with rare facets was thus chosen and given special treatment, both in terms of harvesting conditions and the use of new technologies. An unprecedented process* that imparts fruity accents, tinged with strawberries, peaches and apricots, faithful to the jasmine of yesteryear while preserving all of its radiance. * At Dior. nama_parfum: Miss Dior Eau de Parfum Mini Miss Solid Perfume Refill
description: Solid Perfume Refill - Velvety and Sensual Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description The Miss Dior Eau de Parfum Mini Miss solid perfume is refillable: once finished, replace your fragrance stick with a new refill for continued use. For the 1st time, the House of Dior has developed an alcohol-free solid perfume formula with a clear finish and made from 82%* natural-origin ingredients. Enriched with rose wax, this solid perfume leaves skin feeling soft and moisturized. The stick offers a moment of sensorial indulgence with each touch-up thanks to its non-sticky and comfortable texture. Miss Dior Eau de Parfum Mini Miss is characterized by a velvety and sensual signature, reigned over by a rose note highlighted by accents of fresh lily-of-the-valley, a peony accord and a powdery iris note. The solid perfume refill is sold separately. * Amount calculated based on the ISO 16128-1 and ISO 16128-2 standard. The remaining 18% contribute to the formula�s performance, sensory appeal and stability. ingredients #18962 OCTYLDODECANOL � COCO-CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � DIBUTYL LAUROYL GLUTAMIDE � PHYTOSTERYL/OCTYLDODECYL LAUROYL GLUTAMATE � DIBUTYL ETHYLHEXANOYL GLUTAMIDE � LINALOOL � LIMONENE � HYDROXYCITRONELLAL � GERANIOL � ROSA CENTIFOLIA FLOWER WAX � ROSA DAMASCENA FLOWER WAX � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � TOCOPHEROL � POLYGLYCERYL-2 TRIISOSTEARATE � FARNESOL � CITRAL � TRIMETHYLOLPROPANE TRIISOSTEARATE � CI 45410 (RED 28 LAKE) � CI 15850 (RED 6) � BENZYL BENZOATE � PROPYL GALLATE application tips Unclip the empty, old refill by pulling the silvery case and replace it with a new solid fragrance refill. olfactory notes Base Notes Tender woods Softly comforting musks, a vanilla note and a hint of Tonka bean mingle with sandalwood accords. Heart Notes Rose The rose exudes a subtly spicy floral note. Top Notes Floral bouquet The floral freshness of lily-of-the-valley notes, an expressive peony accord and caressing iris notes accompany a slightly dewy verdant quality. Unisex Eau de Parfum - Floral and Ambery Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description ROSE STAR, THE SILHOUETTE OF DESTINY Rose Star pays homage to two eternal Christian Dior symbols: his lucky star and his iconic flower, the rose. Its fragrance unfurls into different facets of rose, imagined as the 5 points of the Dior guiding star. The top notes of the fragrance are zesty and fruity, blending with a note of Sichuan pepper. They are followed by honeyed and musky accords, giving way to an intense, unexpected trail. An allegorical fragrance, Rose Star is the olfactory embodiment of the original passions that inspired the world of Christian Dior. Unisex Eau de Parfum - Chypre Notes description ingredients application tips description GRIS DIOR, THE CHYPRE-ROSY SILHOUETTE PLEATED WITH CONTRASTS. Gris Dior eau de parfum is an olfactory enigma that forms an indivisible whole, a reflection of its namesake color. Like chypre-rosy pleats, Gris Dior unfolds its different floral and woody facets in turn. A sensation of fullness and volume is thus created, a unisex silhouette with multiple olfactory hues that come together in a mysterious chypre trail punctuated with notes of citrus, rose, violet and then oak moss. A unisex eau de parfum that plays with contrasts, Gris Dior reveals the boldest nuances for those who wear it. Regal fragrance, scent of elegance, which the color gray represents at Dior, it encapsulates the spirit of the House and stands today as the icon of La Collection Priv�e Christian Dior. ingredients WARNING: THE LISTS OF INGREDIENTS THAT MAKE UP THE COMPOSITION OF PARFUMS CHRISTIAN DIOR PRODUCTS ARE REGULARLY UPDATED. Fragrance - Ambery, Woody and Floral Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Discover Dior Homme Parfum reinvented by Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director. A men's fragrance crafted around a dual iris note, both airy and intense. The olfactory interpretation of modern masculinity, a balance between strength and tenderness. Dior Homme Parfum is the story of an encounter: the smooth, carnal notes of iris meet powerful ambery wood accords. A trail that expresses a masculine twist on the flower, with an overdose of iris creating an addictive, sensual, and elegant composition. The structure of the fragrance, airy yet dense, takes shape in a monolithic bottle with clean lines and a sensual color gradient. ingredients #21722 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � CITRUS AURANTIUM BERGAMIA (BERGAMOT) PEEL OIL � TETRAMETHYL ACETYLOCTAHYDRONAPHTHALENES � LIMONENE � LINALYL ACETATE � LINALOOL � COUMARIN � ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE � PINENE � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � CITRUS AURANTIUM PEEL OIL � LAVANDULA OIL/EXTRACT � POGOSTEMON CABLIN OIL � GERANYL ACETATE � DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE � CAMPHOR � CITRAL � BETA-CARYOPHYLLENE � TERPINEOL � TERPINOLENE � GERANIOL � ALPHA-TERPINENE � ROSE KETONES � CINNAMOMUM ZEYLANICUM BARK OIL � CINNAMAL � FARNESOL � EUGENOL � ISOEUGENOL � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with Dior Homme after-shave balm. 3. Refresh with Dior Homme deodorant. 4. Spray on Dior Homme Parfum for the finishing touch. olfactory notes Heart Notes AMBERY ACCORD A gourmet ambery accord where the density of patchouli meets a powerful vetiver, mingled with a note of coumarin and dry accents of cut hay. description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Discover Dior Homme Parfum reinvented by Francis Kurkdjian, Perfume Creative Director. middle_notes: Dior Homme Sport, heightened and generous
description: Eau de Toilette - Fresh, Woody and Spicy Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Energetic and elegant, the new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette combines fresh vivacity and charm tinted with sensuality for a duo that strikes like a boxer's uppercut. Vibrant, explosive, the opening signature of Dior Homme Sport is marked by citrus and the open air, freshness and movement. For this new Dior Homme Sport, the Dior Perfumer-Creator chose to tinge the composition with warm and amber notes, wrap it in spices and round it out with woody notes. The confident trail of Dior Homme Sport incarnates a masculinity entwined with smooth, noble qualtiy. The new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette plays freshness and sensuality. It's a luminous scent enriched with a new, lasting impression that takes hold and lingers like a caress. ingredients #16128 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � LINALOOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRAL � CITRONELLOL � TRIETHYL CITRATE � EUGENOL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � CINNAMAL � GERANIOL � TRIS(TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips Prolong the trail of Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette with the Dior Homme ritual: 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with Dior Homme after-shave balm. 3. Get that fresh feeling with Dior Homme spray deodorant. olfactory notes Base Notes Frankincense and Woody Notes Frankincense appears for the first time at the heart of Dior Homme Sport, heightened and generous. It inspires a heavenly intensity that melds with the woods and amber, emblematic signatures of Dior Homme. Heart Notes Elemi and Pink Pepper This thunderous departure is enriched with intense fresh notes, like the ultra-powerful, resinous and lemony Elemi that enters into dialogue with the juicy citrus and further heightens its expressiveness. Explosive, the peppery spice of Pink Pepper joins in the dance of the new fragrance's composition. Top Notes Reggio di Calabria Bergamot An absolute signature of vibrant top notes, Reggio di Calabria Bergamot is a juicy, zesty and distinguished gust of wind, upheld by an Italian Lemon note. It's a knock to the senses, an appeal to an irresistible freshness now propelled by a vibrant aldehyde note. A MEMBER OF THE UNION FOR ETHICAL BIOTRADE, DIOR IS COMMITTED TO A SOURCING THAT IS RESPECTFUL OF NATURE AND COMMUNITIES. middle_notes: tender wood, in which the virility of Atlas Cedar embraces the enveloping warmth of Haitian Vetiver tinged with spice
base_notes: the composition, endlessly lingering and drawing out the sensuality of the scent of light wood
description: description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is intriguingly powerful and appealingly fresh. Dior Homme redefines a new, masculine sensuality in a polyphony of smooth and raw wood. A heart of tender wood, in which the virility of Atlas Cedar embraces the enveloping warmth of Haitian Vetiver tinged with spice. Wood hand-chiseled by Dior. Dior Homme conveys all the facets of modern masculinity. A man, yes, but a man of many nuances: confident in both his strength and his tenderness. Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is a fragrance with a bold trail that leaves a sensual imprint. ingredients #13837/A ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE � HYDROXYCITRONELLAL � LINALOOL � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRONELLOL � DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE � BHT � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE � COUMARIN � CITRAL � GERANIOL � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � TOCOPHEROL � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) � CI 19140 (YELLOW 5) � application tips Prolong the trail of Dior Homme Eau de Toilette with the Dior Homme ritual: 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of the Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with the Dior Homme aftershave balm. 3. Freshen up with the Dior Homme spray deodorant. olfactory notes Base Notes Vetiver The molecule Iso E gradually settles into the composition, endlessly lingering and drawing out the sensuality of the scent of light wood. The only compound of its kind, it gives Dior Homme that inexplicable "deliciously clean" and fresh sensation. A persistent impression of washed wood, wholly contained in a single, rather magical, note. Heart Notes PATCHOULI HEART Like a friend who ties it all together, the Patchouli Heart is full and enveloping. It mingles with the virile woods to convey a caressing sensuality. Top Notes ATLAS CEDAR Atlas Cedar blows its dry and subtly leathery warmth through the trail of Dior Homme. Combined with Vetiver, it leads a polyphony of woods filled with tension and dialogue. MEMBER OF THE UNION FOR ETHICAL BIOTRADE, THE HOUSE OF DIOR IS COMMITTED TO SOURCING THAT IS RESPECTFUL OF NATURE AND LOCAL COMMUNITIES. description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is intriguingly powerful and appealingly fresh. Eau de Parfum - Citrus and Vanilla Notes - Refillable description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Inspiration for the creation of Sauvage Eau de Parfum was taken from the desert in the magical hour of twilight: mixed with the coolness of the night, the burning desert air exudes profound scents. Sauvage Eau de Parfum is thus the olfactory interpretation of a moment tinted with a thick blue that unleashes the wildest instincts. In the hour when the wolves come out and the sky is set ablaze, a new magic unfolds. Sauvage Eau de Parfum teams the freshness of a juicy, spicy Calabrian bergamot note with the sensuality of a mysterious and enveloping Papua New Guinean vanilla extract accord to unfurl a powerful and noble trail. The 100 ml bottle of Sauvage Eau de Parfum is now refillable with the Sauvage Eau de Parfum refill. It can also be refilled at the Sauvage Refill Station, available at selected sales locations. This innovative system is part of Dior's sustainable development initiative, which aims to improve the House of Dior's impact on the climate, resources and waste. ingredients #16095 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � LINALOOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � TRIETHYL CITRATE � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � CITRAL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � GERANIOL � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 42090 (BLUE 1) � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips 1. Cleanse with Sauvage Shower Gel. 2. Hydrate your skin with Sauvage Moisturizer for Face and Beard. 3. Complete the Sauvage ritual by applying Sauvage Eau de Parfum on pulse points: wrists and neck. olfactory notes Heart Notes Papua New Guinean Vanilla Extract Papua New Guinean vanilla extract unfurls an irresistibly delicious attraction with smoky accents that render it more virile. Harvested green and then scalded, this exceptional vanilla is processed using a solvent-free extraction method to restore the complex power of its aromas while preserving the environment. Top Notes Reggio di Calabria Bergamot This bergamot is a whirlwind of juicy freshness that seems to sweep up everything in its trail. Drenched in the Calabrian sun, it is fruitier than other bergamots and develops slightly peppery and zesty facets. A MEMBER OF THE UNION FOR ETHICAL BIOTRADE, DIOR IS COMMITTED TO A SOURCING THAT IS RESPECTFUL OF NATURE AND COMMUNITIES. Inspiration for the creation of Sauvage Eau de Parfum was taken from the desert in the magical hour of twilight: mixed with the coolness of the night, the burning desert air exudes profound scents. Sauvage Eau de Parfum is thus the olfactory interpretation of a moment tinted with a thick blue that unleashes the wildest instincts. In the hour when the wolves come out and the sky is set ablaze, a new magic unfolds. Sauvage Eau de Parfum teams the freshness of a juicy, spicy Calabrian bergamot note with the sensuality of a mysterious and enveloping Papua New Guinean vanilla extract accord to unfurl a powerful and noble trail. The 100 ml bottle of Sauvage Eau de Parfum is now refillable with the Sauvage Eau de Parfum refill. It can also be refilled at the Sauvage Refill Station, available at selected sales locations. middle_notes: spices, a "tailor-made" lavender essence and a blend of rich woods forming the signature of its powerful, lavish and captivating trail
description: Elixir - Spicy, Fresh and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Sauvage Elixir is an extraordinarily* concentrated fragrance steeped in the emblematic freshness of Sauvage with an intoxicating heart of spices, a "tailor-made" lavender essence and a blend of rich woods forming the signature of its powerful, lavish and captivating trail. The Sauvage Elixir fragrance was created like a fine liqueur made of exceptional ingredients. This concentration was made possible by the exceptional quality of the raw materials: Sauvage Elixir is a fragrance as unique and rare as a red moon in the night sky. Sauvage Elixir concentrates all of its power in a midnight blue lacquered glass bottle in a unique* 60 ml size. This precious bottle, shaped like a vial, features multiple sophisticated designs: the magical name of the fragrance is inscribed in shiny silver on a label engraved right into the glass. The dome-shaped bottom engraved with the CD logo marks its silhouette. * At Dior.1 ingredients #15755 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LINALOOL � LIMONENE � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � EUGENOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � TRIETHYL CITRATE � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � GERANIOL � CINNAMAL � CITRAL � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � FARNESOL � ISOEUGENOL � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) � CI 19140 (YELLOW 5) � CI 42090 (BLUE 1) application tips 1. Cleanse your skin with Sauvage Shower Gel. 2. Soothe razor burn with Sauvage After-shave Lotion. >3. Apply Sauvage Elixir on pulse points. olfactory notes Base Notes Rich woods An ambery accord, the powerful Sauvage signature, reveals its full range of velvety and sensual nuances. Enveloping, it blankets the base heightened with a sweet, smooth licorice note. Haitian vetiver and a patchouli heart form the link between these rich woods. Heart Notes Essence of AOP lavender from Nyons A blend of several carefully selected harvests, this AOP essence from Nyons reveals unique* facets and releases notes that are as close as possible to the wild flower. Fresh but not camphorous, graced with a vanilla-tinged coumarin note, it is rich, fine and floral. Top Notes Grapefruit note and heart of spices Top notes burst with a lively, persistent grapefruit note and heady spices. Some, like the essences of cinnamon and nutmeg, play with heat and sensuality, while others are more refreshing, like the zesty and aromatic cardamom.
